title: Coastal Key Executive Administrator Avatar
role: Delivers operations status, incident summaries, and workflow reports to the CEO.

skin: vellus hair / peach fuzz visible in rim lighting
eyes: scleral vein network at natural density
tear film moisture on lower lid
lighting: three-point cinematic (warm key, cool fill, soft rim)

subject.name: Marcus Reyes
description: Composite original character; no real-person likeness
Short dark-brown hair, side-parted, lightly textured
Warm brown eyes with direct, focused gaze
Medium-brown skin tone with natural variation
Strong bone structure, cleanly shaved, subtle 5-o-clock shadow visible in rim light
Neutral resting expression with confident micro-smile

wardrobe: Charcoal three-piece wool suit, single-button waistcoat visible
Crisp white cotton shirt, no tie
Brushed-steel chronograph-style watch on left wrist (generic, no brand)
Suit fabric drapes naturally with shoulder motion
environment: Clean executive studio set, soft neutral backdrop (warm gray, slightly darker than Avatar 01 for contrast)
Daylight key from camera-right at 45 degrees
Shallow depth of field, backdrop reads as soft gradient
No windows, no text, no on-screen graphics

camera.framing: medium close-up, collarbone to slightly above head

idleBehaviors: breathing cycle at 13 breaths per minute
natural blink rate 15 per minute with varied timing
subtle jaw-set micro-movement reinforcing authority cue

deliveryProfile.cadence: steady; incident language delivered flat and factual

qualityGates: Skin: no waxy plastic appearance; visible pores; natural variation
Eyes: visible corneal reflection; tear film on lower lid
Loop: first and last frames match perfectly
Frame rate: steady 60 fps; no judder
